response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong ownership, mentorship, and 18+ years of development experience, the role requires hands-on C++ expertise with recent, substantial systems programming and networking experience. His recent 8+ years have focused entirely on web/full-stack development (TypeScript/Node.js/React), and his C++ experience is limited to 2014-2015. The role also demands industrial cybersecurity domain knowledge and secure development lifecycle practices, neither present in his background. The substantial gap between his current skill set and the role's core technical requirements makes this a significant mismatch despite his strong general engineering fundamentals.
strengths: 18+ years of software development experience with demonstrated ownership and quality mindset across multiple domains and companies
Strong collaborative and mentoring skills with evidence of organizing code katas and refactoring dojos; cross-functional teamwork at scale
Systems programming background including low-latency architecture work at Dunnhumby and embedded systems experience with D language and robotics
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (last used 2014-2015 at National Instruments); recent 8+ years exclusively in web/full-stack development with TypeScript/Node.js/React
No demonstrated expertise in core technical requirements: message brokers, MQTT, REST APIs, multi-threading, networking protocols, or secure development lifecycle standards
No industrial automation, IoT, manufacturing domain experience, or familiarity with industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC standards, OPC UA) required for the role

key_factors.factor: Overall software engineering maturity and mentorship capability
